However, I also know that I'm not perfect and sometimes struggle with procrastination. But overall, I'd say that I lean more towards the early completion side of the spectrum. I've had experiences where I've had to work under tight deadlines, such as when I was in graduate school or when I was working on a project at 'Pathways to Education.' In those situations, I've learned to manage my time effectively and prioritize tasks to ensure that I meet the deadline. Additionally, my faith has taught me the importance of being responsible and reliable, which has helped me develop a sense of discipline and accountability.
